content.en:
"This mysterious Great Ancestor has actually condensed the Infinite Will Lake, and he has only broken through to the third echelon of the high-level immeasurable life form!"

One Great Ancestor said in shock.

At this time, even the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea and the Great Ancestor of the Raccoon Blood had to admit that Ye Tian was too demonic.

Although only Ye Tian's immeasurable will level can be seen at present, some things can be seen from the immeasurable will level and the trace of aura revealed.

Obviously, Ye Tian was far from an ordinary high-level immeasurable lifeform, and his combat power was definitely terrifying, even if the immeasurable blood condensed was not much, but the real combat power was not much worse than them.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's immeasurable will lake gradually condensed, and the immeasurable will underwent earth-shaking changes.

Rumble!!!!

The Infinite Will Lake was completely condensed, and Ye Tian's strength had also undergone a transformation, becoming stronger than before.

"My strength is very strong now, at least several times stronger!"

Ye Tian muttered in his heart.

Immediately, he tried to walk up the six-hundredth stone steps, and this time he easily walked up.

Airplanes!!!!!

The benefit given by the ruins stone tower fell on Ye Tian's hand, and it was a small silver token.

"What is this?"

After many Great Ancestors saw it, they looked puzzled, they didn't know this token, but it didn't look like a precious treasure, and they felt that it was completely incomparable to the Black Yang Nine Spirit Flower obtained by the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor!

However, after seeing this silver token, the Blood Ancestor and the Star Sea Ancestor pondered for a while, and there were some guesses in their hearts.

"It can't be that, right?"

When they thought of the origin of this thing, their expressions changed drastically.

This is not an ordinary thing, but it involves a great opportunity, but it is of no use to them at the moment, and even if they get it, it is meaningless.

......

Genki Pavilion.

An incarnation of the Star Sea Great Ancestor immediately reported to the Xuanxin Great Ancestor.

"Xuanxin Great Ancestor, the token of Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor has been born!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor said.

"Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor's token was born, are you sure?" Xuanxin Great Ancestor was taken aback.

"Sure, I saw it in the Ruined Stone Tower!" said the Star Sea Ancestor.

"The Relic Stone Tower?" "The Xinghai Great Ancestor was a little surprised, "How could the Relic Stone Tower have the token of the Silver Heng Heavenly Ancestor?" It should have been placed in the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss, and then it was picked up by the Relic Stone Tower, and then it fell into the Relic Stone Tower. "

"Xuanxin Great Ancestor, do we Xuanqi Pavilion want to snatch that token?"

Xinghai Great Ancestor asked.

He didn't need the token of the Silver Heng Heavenly Ancestor, but the Xuanqi Pavilion needed it, this thing was valuable to the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fifth stage.

Xuanxin Great Ancestor was silent for a while, and then shook his head: "No, now that mysterious Great Ancestor has obtained the token of Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor, this matter is estimated to have been spread." If we snatch it, even if we get that token, we won't dare to use it, with the strength of Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor, we can understand everything in an instant, and when the time comes, it will not be a good thing to anger our Xuanqi Pavilion!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor nodded slightly, the current Xuanqi Pavilion really couldn't afford to offend Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor, even if there was only the slightest possibility, they didn't dare to take the risk.

Moreover, if they really dared to make a move, then other forces would dare to snatch the token from Xuanqi Pavilion, so that they would not offend Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor.

"Give up, even if I get that token, I won't necessarily get benefits!"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor Dao.

"I see!"

Xinghai Great Ancestor responded.

......

The sixth floor of the Ruins Stone Tower.

Ye Tian obtained this token, and he didn't know what it was for, and after putting it away, he was sent to the seventh layer by the Ruins Stone Tower.

As soon as he entered the seventh floor of the Ruins Stone Tower, Ye Tian saw the Extreme Yang Great Ancestor.

The Extreme Yang Great Ancestor was a little surprised when he saw Ye Tian.

He didn't expect that the second person to enter the seventh layer of the Ruins Stone Tower was Ye Tian, and he thought it was someone on the immeasurable blood list!

Of course, he didn't think too much about it, and immediately didn't care about Ye Tian.

At this time.

Ye Tian received some information from the seventh layer of the Ruins Stone Tower and learned about the situation on the seventh layer.

The seventh layer of the Ruins Stone Tower is also known as the Brand Layer, where some of the imprints between heaven and earth are stored.

Of course, they are all traces of the Nine Shadows Blood Abyss, but the traces that are eligible to be included in the Ruins Stone Tower must be extremely powerful imprints, and at the very least, they are also traces of the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique.

And if you want to gain benefits from the seventh layer, you must practice an Infinite Extreme Domain Technique.

"If the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform wants to practice an immeasurable extreme domain technique, this difficulty is a bit against the sky!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Of course, he had already cultivated an Infinite Extreme Domain Technique, so it was not very difficult for him to practice an Infinite Extreme Domain Technique again.

And the seventh layer also has a time limit, each great ancestor can only choose one to imprint enlightenment, the time is the first year of the thirty million realm, once the enlightenment fails, he will also be kicked out, and he will never be able to enter the seventh layer again.

However, the sixth floor can still be entered, and it is regarded as a treasure place for cultivation.

Ye Tian briefly browsed it, there were a total of thirteen imprint traces stored here, and all of them were traces of the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique, but some were very weak, and some were extremely strong.

"Just choose this Infinite Extreme Domain Technique!"

Ye Tian decided.

The Infinite Extreme Domain Technique he chose was a Kendo Infinite Extreme Domain Level, and it was also the most powerful of these Infinite Extreme Domain Techniques, and the difficulty of cultivation was naturally higher.

Although the Ruins Stone Tower imprinted the traces of the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique, it was very difficult to comprehend, and it was even more difficult than the inheritance that Ye Tian had received in the Truncated Black Mountain at the beginning.

After all, the Infinite Extreme Domain Technique of Truncating Black Mountain is an inheritance, and this is not a inheritance, so it will be very difficult to comprehend.

However, the major forces in the Xuanqi Realm all have some treasures that assist in enlightenment, and if they do their best to help them, it is not without hope that they will be enlightened.

Ye Tian found a place and began to silently comprehend this sword dao immeasurable extreme domain technique.

"This Kendo Infinite Extreme Domain Technique is a bit incomplete, and it is not complete, even if it is really practiced, the power is greatly reduced, and the potential is not great. It seems that the same is true for other Infinite Extreme Domain Techniques, and the potential of cultivation is too poor to compare to a complete inheritance. Moreover, in the future, there is no way to continue to improve. Ye Tian thought to himself.

But after all, this is only the imprint of the ruins stone tower, and the requirements cannot be too high.

As the years passed, Ye Tian slowly came to his senses, and after a period of time, the Xinghai Great Ancestors and them finally condensed the Infinite Will Lake one by one and stepped into the seventh layer of the Ruins Stone Tower.
